debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
P : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
h : @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P
⊢ (symmDiff M P.edgeSet).encard = M.encard + 1

failed_attempts:
have hmax : G.IsMaxMatching (M ∆ E(P)) :=
    (h.augment).isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (h.augment_vertex_subset)
  have hmax0 : G.IsMaxMatching M :=
    hM.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (by
      intro x hx
      by_contra hxM
      exact h.first_not_in ((by simpa [V, hxM] using hx) : x ∈ V(G, M)))
  have hν : (M ∆ E(P)).encard = ν(G) := hmax.encard
  have hν0 : M.encard = ν(G) := hmax0.encard
  simpa [hν0] using hν

classical
  have hdisj : Disjoint M (E(P)) := by
    refine disjoint_left.2 ?_
    intro e heM heP
    have heP' : e ∈ P.edgeSet := by simpa [E] using heP
    have heM' : e ∈ M := heM
    have hV : V(G, e) ⊆ V(G, M) := by
      intro t ht
      refine ⟨e, ?_, ht⟩
      simpa [V] using heM'
    have hx : P.first ∈ V(G, e) := by
      simpa [V, WList.first, WList.edgeSet] using (h.toIsAltPath.toIsPath.first_mem_inc_of_mem_edgeSet heP')
    exact h.first_not_in (hV hx)
  simpa [symmDiff_eq, Set.encard_union_eq, Set.encard_diff, hdisj, Set.disjoint_left] using
    (Set.encard_symmDiff_eq_encard_add_encard_of_disjoint hdisj)

classical
  obtain ⟨hP, hnP, hfst, hlst⟩ := h
  have hAlt : G.IsAltPath hM P := h.toIsAltPath
  have hchain := hAlt.mem_matching_iff
  have htrail : P.IsTrail := hP.isTrail
  have hedge_nodup : P.edge.Nodup := htrail.edge_nodup
  have hEPfin : (E(P) : Set β).Finite := by
    simpa [WList.edgeSet] using (P.edge.toFinset.finite_toSet)
  have hMEPfin : (M ∩ E(P)).Finite := hEPfin.subset (by intro e he; exact he.2)
  have hmem : ∀ ⦃v : α⦄, v ∈ V(G, E(P) ∩ M) ↔ v ∈ V(G, M) ∧ v ∈ V(G, E(P)) := by
    intro v
    constructor
    · intro hv
      rcases hv with ⟨e, he, hv⟩
      exact ⟨⟨e, he.2, hv⟩, ⟨e, he.1, hv⟩⟩
    · rintro ⟨⟨e, heM, hv⟩, ⟨f, hfE, hv'⟩⟩
      rcases hM.subsingleton_inc v ⟨heM, by simpa [E_inc_iff] using hv⟩ ⟨(by
        have : f ∈ E(G, v) := by simpa [E_inc_iff] using hv'
        exact ⟨by
          have := hP.subset_edgeSet hfE
          exact this, this⟩), this⟩ with rfl
      exact ⟨e, ⟨hfE, heM⟩, hv'⟩
  have hend : P.first ∈ V(G, E(P)) ∧ P.last ∈ V(G, E(P)) := by
    rcases hnP with ⟨x, y, e, P', rfl⟩
    constructor
    · refine ⟨e, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp [WList.edgeSet]
      · simp [WList.first, WList.V, WList.inc]
    · refine ⟨e, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp [WList.edgeSet]
      · simp [WList.last, WList.V, WList.inc]
  have hfst' : P.first ∉ V(G, E(P) ∩ M) := by
    intro hcontra
    have : P.first ∈ V(G, M) := (hmem.mp hcontra).1
    exact hfst this
  have hlst' : P.last ∉ V(G, E(P) ∩ M) := by
    intro hcontra
    have : P.last ∈ V(G, M) := (hmem.mp hcontra).1
    exact hlst this
  have hVEM : V(G, E(P) ∩ M) = V(G, M) ∩ V(G, E(P)) := by
    ext v
    simpa [Set.mem_inter_iff] using (hmem (v := v)).symm
  have hcount :
      (E(P) ∩ M).encard + 1 = (E(P) \ M).encard := by
    have hfinite1 : (E(P) ∩ M).Finite := hMEPfin
    have hfinite2 : (E(P) \ M).Finite := hEPfin.subset (by intro e he; exact he.1)
    have htotal : (E(P) ∩ M).encard + (E(P) \ M).encard = (E(P) : Set β).encard := by
      simpa [Set.inter_assoc, Set.inter_left_comm, Set.inter_comm, Set.diff_eq, Set.symmDiff_def]
        using (encard_add_encard_eq_encard_union hfinite1 hfinite2 (by
          rw [disjoint_left]
          intro e he1 he2
          exact he2.2 he1.2))
    have hEPodd : Odd (E(P) : Set β).encard := by
      rcases hnP.exists_concat with ⟨w', f, y, rfl⟩
      simp [WList.edgeSet, Odd.add_odd]
    have : (E(P) \ M).encard = (E(P) ∩ M).encard + 1 := by
      have hpar := hEPodd.add_eq_one_of_add_eq (a := (E(P) ∩ M).encard) (b := (E(P) \ M).encard)
        (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using htotal)
      simpa [Nat.add_comm] using hpar.symm
    simpa [Nat.add_comm] using this.symm
  have hsymm : (M ∆ E(P)).encard = (M \ E(P)).encard + (E(P) \ M).encard := by
    have hfin1 : (M \ E(P)).Finite := by
      classical
      by_cases hMfin : M.Finite
      · exact hMfin.subset (by intro e he; exact he.1)
      ·
        have : (M \ E(P)).Finite := by
          refine (Set.finite_diff ?_ hEPfin)
          exact Set.finite_univ
        exact this
    have hfin2 : (E(P) \ M).Finite := hEPfin.subset (by intro e he; exact he.1)
    have hdisj : Disjoint (M \ E(P)) (E(P) \ M) := by
      rw [disjoint_left]
      intro e he1 he2
      exact he1.2 he2.1
    simpa [Set.symmDiff_def, Set.diff_union, Set.diff_diff, Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm,
      Set.union_comm, Set.diff_eq, Set.inter_assoc, Set.inter_left_comm, Set.inter_comm] using
      (encard_union_eq hfin1 hfin2 hdisj)
  have hcancel :
      (M ∆ E(P)).encard = M.encard + 1 := by
    have hMcap : (M ∩ E(P)).encard = (E(P) ∩ M).encard := by
      simpa [Set.inter_comm]
    have hdecomp :
        M.encard = (M \ E(P)).encard + (M ∩ E(P)).encard := by
      classical
      by_cases hMfin : M.Finite
      ·
        have hfin1 : (M \ E(P)).Finite := hMfin.subset (by intro e he; exact he.1)
        have hfin2 : (M ∩ E(P)).Finite := hMfin.subset (by intro e he; exact he.1)
        have hdisj : Disjoint (M \ E(P)) (M ∩ E(P)) := by
          rw [disjoint_left]
          intro e he1 he2
          exact he1.2 he2.2
        have hunion : (M \ E(P)) ∪ (M ∩ E(P)) = M := by
          ext e
          by_cases heE : e ∈ E(P)
          · simp [heE]
          · simp [heE]
        simpa [hunion, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using
          (encard_union_eq hfin1 hfin2 hdisj).symm
      ·
        have : M.encard = ⊤ := by simpa [Set.encard_eq_top] using hMfin
        simp [this]
    have :
        (M ∆ E(P)).encard =
          (M \ E(P)).encard + ((E(P) ∩ M).encard + 1) := by
      calc
        (M ∆ E(P)).encard
            = (M \ E(P)).encard + (E(P) \ M).encard := hsymm
        _ = (M \ E(P)).encard + ((E(P) ∩ M).encard + 1) := by
              simpa [hcount]
    calc
      (M ∆ E(P)).encard
          = (M \ E(P)).encard + ((E(P) ∩ M).encard + 1) := this
      _ = ((M \ E(P)).encard + (E(P) ∩ M).encard) + 1 := by
            omega
      _ = (M.encard) + 1 := by
            simpa [hdecomp, hMcap, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]
  simpa [WList.edgeSet] using hcancel

simpa [symmDiff, Set.encard_union_eq, Set.disjoint_left, and_left_comm, and_assoc, and_comm]
    using h.toIsAltPath.toIsPath.augment_encard hM h.nonempty h.first_not_in h.last_not_in

classical
  have hfinM : M.Finite := by
    exact hM.subset.finite
  have hfinE : (E(P) : Set β).Finite := by
    simpa [WList.edgeSet] using (P.edge.toFinset.finite_toSet)
  have hdisj : Disjoint M (E(P) \ M) := by
    refine disjoint_left.2 ?_
    intro e heM he
    exact he.2 heM
  have hsub : M ⊆ M ∆ E(P) := by
    intro e he
    exact Or.inl ⟨he, by intro heE; exact (by
      have : e ∈ (E(P) ∩ M) := ⟨heE, he⟩
      simpa [symmDiff, diff_eq, mem_inter_iff, mem_diff] using this)⟩
  have hcard_union :
      (M ∆ E(P)).encard = M.encard + ((E(P) \ M).encard) := by
    have : M ∆ E(P) = M ∪ (E(P) \ M) := by
      ext e
      by_cases heM : e ∈ M
      · simp [symmDiff, heM]
      · simp [symmDiff, heM]
    rw [this, encard_union_eq (hfinM) hfinE.diff hdisj]
  have hone : (E(P) \ M).encard = 1 := by
    sorry
  simpa [hone, hcard_union, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]

classical
  simpa [symmDiff_comm, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using h.augment_encard
simpa [symmDiff_comm] using h.augment_encard (G := G) (hM := hM) (P := P)

classical
  have h0 : M.encard ≠ ⊤ := by
    intro ht
    have : (M ∆ E(P)).encard = ⊤ := by simpa [ht]
    exact (Nat.succ_ne_self ⊤) (by simpa [this, ht] using congrArg (fun n => n) rfl)
  have hEfin : (E(P)).Finite := by
    simpa [WList.edgeSet] using (h.toIsPath.edgeSet_finite : P.edgeSet.Finite)
  have hEcard : (E(P)).encard = P.edge.length := by
    simpa [WList.edgeSet] using (h.toIsPath.encard_edgeSet_eq_length : P.edgeSet.encard = P.edge.length)
  have hEM : (E(P) ∩ M).encard = (P.edge.length / 2) := by
    sorry
  have hEnM : (E(P) \ M).encard = (P.edge.length / 2 + 1) := by
    sorry
  have hdisj : Disjoint (M \ E(P)) (E(P) \ M) := by
    exact disjoint_left.2 (by
      intro e he
      exact he.1.2 he.2.1)
  have hsd : M ∆ E(P) = (M \ E(P)) ∪ (E(P) \ M) := by
    ext e
    by_cases hme : e ∈ M <;> by_cases hpe : e ∈ E(P) <;> simp [symmDiff, hme, hpe]
  have hfin1 : (M \ E(P)).Finite := by
    refine (hEfin.subset ?_).subset ?_
    · intro e he; exact he.2
    · intro e he; exact he.1
  have hfin2 : (E(P) \ M).Finite := hEfin.subset (by intro e he; exact he.1)
  have hcard1 : (M \ E(P)).encard = M.encard - (E(P) ∩ M).encard := by
    simpa [diff_eq, inter_assoc, inter_left_comm, inter_comm] using
      (encard_sdiff (s := M) (t := E(P)) (hEfin.subset (by intro e he; exact he.2)))
  have hcard2 : (E(P) \ M).encard = (E(P)).encard - (E(P) ∩ M).encard := by
    simpa [diff_eq, inter_assoc, inter_left_comm, inter_comm] using
      (encard_sdiff (s := E(P)) (t := M) (hEfin.subset (by intro e he; exact he.2)))
  calc
    (M ∆ E(P)).encard
        = ((M \ E(P)) ∪ (E(P) \ M)).encard := by simpa [hsd]
    _ = (M \ E(P)).encard + (E(P) \ M).encard := by
          simpa [hdisj, hfin1, hfin2] using (encard_union_eq (hdisj) (hfin1) (hfin2))
    _ = (M.encard - (E(P) ∩ M).encard) + ((E(P)).encard - (E(P) ∩ M).encard) := by
          simp [hcard1, hcard2]
    _ = M.encard + 1 := by
          sorry
simpa [symmDiff_comm, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using h.augment_encard
simpa [symmDiff_comm] using h.augment_encard (hM := hM) (P := P) (h := h)
